title: $display lost if part of always table

features.name: display with only string literal before case statement
features.description: Code should include $display system task called with only a string literal argument before a case statement with 7 or more branches in a clocked always block
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk) begin $display("I was here"); case (state) 7_branches: begin end endcase end

features.name: display in clocked always block with case having 7 branches
features.description: Code should include $display in an always @(posedge clk) block followed by a case statement with exactly 7 branches
features.snippet: always @(posedge CLK) begin $display("msg"); case (state) state_1: x<=1; state_2: x<=2; state_3: x<=3; state_4: x<=4; state_5: x<=5; state_6: x<=6; default: x<=0; endcase end
